evidence_summary: Base branch, merge-base, and HEAD all resolve to b69758ef24658acfd4ce4ae433147ac83743c5d5, so the observed round diff is the uncommitted working-tree payload. That payload stays inside the docs-only milestone-1 scope: one new freeze artifact plus round packet files only, with no code, test, Cabal, roadmap, or controller-state widening beyond the controller-owned state modification already called out by the plan. The artifact passes the required section/token/forbidden-token checks, preserves the accepted round-200/round-201 lineage and closed predecessor truths, freezes the inherited-boundary table clause by clause, names the exact live broader positive P5 subject and exact lawful milestone-2/milestone-3 outcomes, and remains planning-only and non-enacting.
implemented_stage_result: one canonical docs-only milestone-1 freeze artifact plus round packet files only
